description: Ferryhopper is a ferry travel and booking platform that aggregates routes, schedules, and operators across multiple countries. It helps travelers discover ferry connections and complete bookings through its website and partner products.
summary: Ferryhopper exposes a public no-auth MCP server at https://mcp.ferryhopper.com/mcp and advertises a separate B2B HTTP API called FerryhAPI, but its endpoint/spec/auth details are not publicly documented.
